## 1. Sign in to ScreenAssist <a id="1-sign-in-to-screenassist"></a>

The pro film room every basketball player can run. Self-tag your plays, get pro-grade stats, auto-build a recruit reel.

1. Look at **the email field**.
2. Type **"eran@bstat.dev"**.
3. Look at **the password field**.
4. Type **"test1234"**.
5. Notice **the sign-in button**.
6. Click the target element. *(no description — line 28)*

## 2. Overview — your player card <a id="2-overview-your-player-card"></a>

Name, team, jersey, season at a glance. The first thing a recruiter sees.

1. Look at **the player card heading**.

## 3. Season splits — per-game averages <a id="3-season-splits-per-game-averages"></a>

Points, rebounds, assists, shooting splits — broken down by competition so league play isn't muddied by scrimmages.

## 4. Recent games — every score, one click away <a id="4-recent-games-every-score-one-click-away"></a>

W/L marker, opponent, score, venue. Click any row and you're in the per-game breakdown.

## 5. Top plays — every tagged moment, instantly playable <a id="5-top-plays-every-tagged-moment-instantly-playable"></a>

Each thumbnail is a real clip. One click, the play viewer opens — no editing, no exporting.

## 6. Jump between clips with one button <a id="6-jump-between-clips-with-one-button"></a>

Side arrows or keyboard — review every play in your library without a single page reload.

## 7. Stats — every game at a glance <a id="7-stats-every-game-at-a-glance"></a>

Drafts in progress, completed league games, the whole season laid out. Edit metadata, resume tagging, drill into the box score.

1. Click the target element. *(no description — line 140)*

## 8. Analysis — the shot chart that finds patterns <a id="8-analysis-the-shot-chart-that-finds-patterns"></a>

Hexbin or zone view. Hex size is volume, color is efficiency. Hot zones in green, cold in red.

1. Click the target element. *(no description — line 162)*

## 9. Click any zone, watch every clip from it <a id="9-click-any-zone-watch-every-clip-from-it"></a>

Every row on the right side is a bucket — by zone, shot type, contest level, quarter, opponent. One click and the player surfaces every clip from that bucket.

1. Click the target element. *(no description — line 186)*

## 10. Or watch the whole season — all 22 shots <a id="10-or-watch-the-whole-season-all-22-shots"></a>

The big "Watch All" button up top plays every shot in the season as one continuous reel.

## 11. Analysis sub-tabs — assists, rebounds, turnovers, steals, blocks <a id="11-analysis-sub-tabs-assists-rebounds-turnovers-steals-blocks"></a>

Same depth, different lens. Each sub-tab breaks the play type down by zone, shot type, contest, quarter, and game.

1. Click the target element. *(no description — line 227)*
2. Click the target element. *(no description — line 235)*

## 12. Plays — the full library, fully searchable <a id="12-plays-the-full-library-fully-searchable"></a>

Sixty plays, two views: filters on the left, the full play list on the right with notes alongside.

1. Click the target element. *(no description — line 249)*

## 13. Highlights — the reel builds itself <a id="13-highlights-the-reel-builds-itself"></a>

Auto-built per game. Watch, manage, build a new one — or share the live reel as a link.

1. Click the target element. *(no description — line 278)*

## 14. Share — your profile becomes a link <a id="14-share-your-profile-becomes-a-link"></a>

The Share button opens a popover: toggle public or private, copy the link, send it.

## 15. That's ScreenAssist <a id="15-that-s-screenassist"></a>

Tag your plays. Get pro-grade stats. Auto-build a recruit reel. Share one link. Free during the public beta.

---

## Warnings

- line 28: click has no description (selector: button[type='submit'])
- line 140: click has no description (selector: header a[href='/games'])
- line 162: click has no description (selector: header a[href='/analysis'])
- line 186: click has no description (selector: button[aria-label='Watch Paint clips'])
- line 227: click has no description (selector: a[href='/analysis/assists'])
- line 235: click has no description (selector: a[href='/analysis/rebounds'])
- line 249: click has no description (selector: header a[href='/plays'])
- line 278: click has no description (selector: header a[href='/highlights'])
